chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 894 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 26.09.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing, learned Counsel for the respondent-SMC states that they don’t have any policy with regard to deceased quota. In the peculiar circumstances where the petitioner was widowed when she was 34 years of age and her husband was in active service, who is now survived by two minor children, let the petitioner file an application which may be considered sympathetically by respondent No.5, and if criteria of age, qualification etc. matches with any of the position available with Sukkur Municipal Corporation, let an offer be made to her. We are disposing of this petition, and a report regarding findings made on the application of the petitioner be furnished through Additional Registrar of this Court within thirty days. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
